stemHtml: The ILS receiver of an aircraft on approach and flying to the right of the runway centreline will receive which of the following?

options.a: More of the 150 Hz localiser signal than the 90 Hz localiser signal.
options.b: A modulated signal that will move the localiser needle to the right according to the magnitude of the difference between the two amplitudes.
options.c: More of the 90 Hz localiser signal than the 150 Hz localiser signal.
